title: Fix serve.py quality and efficiency issues

log.context: Fix serve.py quality and efficiency issues

All four fixes applied, service restarted (active), committed and pushed. Here's what changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/serve.py`:

1. **Fix 1** (line 62): `INTERNAL_TOKEN = os.environ.get('INTERNAL_TOKEN') or None` — prevents an empty string from being treated as a valid token, which would have allowed the `hmac.compare_digest` branch to run against `''`.
